states.name: Shanna
states.title: Snowkissed Maid
states.description:
When she set out on her mercenary journey, Shanna thought she would only learn the ways of combat. As it happens, she's discovered Christmas too.

The human holiday mystifies her a bit. The saru are a generous people, but they are also practical. They exchange gifts all year long with little fanfare. So why do humans tie them up with bows and leave them under a tree? Why do they build cookie houses without eating them? Why do people gather to sing songs in the snow? Aren't they cold?

There's much she still needs to learn, but she thinks she likes this strange celebration of theirs.

states.name: Shanna
states.title: Snowkissed Maid
states.description:
"Oh, you made it! Welcome!"

"Do you want some eggnog? A candy cane? How about a gingerbread man?"

"The market didn't have any more turkies, so I caught one myself! Did I make it right? It's over there, next to the pancakes. Go sit by the fire, I'll bring you some!"

"Huh? Why did I make all of this for you? It's Christmas, isn't it?"

"...n-not for two more days?"

"..."

"Just think of it like a Christmas ambush, okay?"
